chunks.title: Yahweh's Command and Joshua's Preparation
chunks.reason: Divine instruction followed by the strategic deployment of troops.

chunks.title: The Ambush Strategy Unfolds
chunks.reason: Narrative description of the army positioning and the enemy's pursuit.

chunks.title: The Capture and Destruction of Ai
chunks.reason: Climactic battle action, the city's burning, and the execution of the king.

chunks.title: The Covenant Ceremony at Mount Ebal
chunks.reason: Ritual observance involving altar construction, sacrifice, and the reading of the Law.
